title: About
lead: I combine meticulous front-end development with modular back-end architectures to build robust, scalable, and user-friendly applications.

cards.description: Development of responsive and modular interfaces in TypeScript using Vue 3 and Nuxt 4. Priority is given to adhering to design mockups, ensuring smooth transitions, and optimizing the client-side bundle.
Designing robust and secure REST APIs with AdonisJS. Managing relational databases, data modeling, and performance-optimized business logic.
Design of modern mockups focused on the user experience. Efficient and rigorous integration with Tailwind CSS v4 by leveraging the power of native CSS variables.
Deployment and administration of services on Ubuntu Server. Build automation (CI/CD), containerization with Docker, management of Nginx reverse proxies, and technical SEO optimization (SSR).

highlights: Clean code, lightweight queries, and server-side rendering to ensure instant loading
I'm naturally curious and enjoy exploring the latest developments in frameworks to adopt industry best practices.
